recommendations.title: Attack on Titan: Wings of Freedom
recommendations.overview: As the Trost District is reclaimed from the Titans, Eren is taken under the wing of Captain Levi and his squad, who decide to try and teach him to master his mysterious abilities.

recommendations.title: Attack on Titan: Chronicle
recommendations.overview: In the fourth recap movie, episodes 1 to 59 of the anime are retold, compiling the first Three seasons of Attack on Titan into a two-hour event.

recommendations.title: High School of the Dead: Drifters of the Dead
recommendations.overview: In their efforts to find a safe haven from the zombie apocalypse, the gang find themselves on a deserted island. Now, they take advantage of the momentary respite to enjoy some surf, sand and bathing suits!

recommendations.title: Attack on Titan: Crimson Bow and Arrow
recommendations.overview: When man-eating Titans first appeared 100 years ago, humans found safety behind massive walls that stopped the giants in their tracks. But the safety they have had for so long is threatened when a colossal Titan smashes through the barriers, causing

recommendations.title: Attack on Titan: The Roar of Awakening
recommendations.overview: Eren Yeager and others of the 104th Training Corps have just begun to become full members of the Survey Corps. As they ready themselves to face the Titans once again, their preparations are interrupted by the invasion of Wall Rose—but all is not as i

recommendations.title: Death Note Relight 2: L's Successors
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Thriller, Animation, Crime, Drama, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: L's successor must ponder L's defeat if he hopes to succeed where his famed predecessor failed. At the headquarters of the SPK, he calls upon the Japanese task force to declare war on Light. A recap of Death Note episodes 27–37, with new footage.

recommendations.title: Death Note Relight 1: Visions of a God
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Crime, Drama, Fantasy, Thriller, Animation
recommendations.overview: When rogue shinigami Ryuk leaves his Death Note in the human world, he has no idea how far the one who finds it will take his new-found power. With the Death Note in hand, brilliant high school student Light Yagami vows to rid the world of evil. A re

recommendations.title: Perfect Blue
recommendations.overview: Rising pop star Mima quits singing to pursue a career as an actress. After she takes up a role on a popular detective show, her handlers and collaborators begin turning up murdered. Harboring feelings of guilt and haunted by visions of her former sel

recommendations.title: Drifting Home
recommendations.overview: One fateful summer, a group of elementary school kids set adrift on an abandoned apartment building must look within themselves to find a way back home.

recommendations.title: Pokémon the Movie 2000
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction, Family
recommendations.overview: When Lawrence III's scheme to capture the Legendary Pokémon Lugia upsets the balance of nature, it is up to Ash Ketchum and his friends to save the world.
